System status

Real-time uptime, incident history, and component-level health is published at status.agcms.com (powered by Better Stack). The mirror below reflects the most recent probe.

Components

  • Gateway (api.agcms.com)
    SLA 99.95%Operational
  • Dashboard (app.agcms.com)
    SLA 99.9%Operational
  • Audit chain writer
    SLA 99.99%Operational
  • Public verifier (/trust/verify)
    SLA 99.9%Operational
  • WorkOS SSO bridge
    SLA 99.9%Operational
  • Notifications dispatcher
    SLA 99.5%Operational

SLA tiers

PlanUptime targetRemedy
Enterprise99.95% gateway availabilityService credits per MSA
Business99.9% gateway availabilityService credits per MSA
StarterBest-effort—

Want to be paged on incidents? Subscribe at status.agcms.com, or wire AGCMS itself into PagerDuty / Slack via Notifications.
